mapper.sql: id, user_id, username, module, action, target_type, target_id, description, request_method, request_url, request_ip, request_params, response_code, cost_time, status, error_msg, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM yx_audit_log WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yx_audit_log ( user_id, username, module, action, target_type, target_id, description, request_method, request_url, request_ip, request_params, response_code, cost_time, status, error_msg ) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.username}, #{item.module}, #{item.action}, #{item.targetType}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.description}, #{item.requestMethod}, #{item.requestUrl}, #{item.requestIp}, #{item.requestParams}, #{item.responseCode}, #{item.costTime}, #{item.status}, #{item.errorMsg})
